task_completion.description: Open the print or export dialog in the DICOM viewer.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A print, export, or save dialog is open over the DICOM viewer interface.

task_completion.description: Select PDF as the output format.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The format dropdown, radio button, or printer selection is explicitly set to 'PDF' or 'Print to File (PDF)'.

task_completion.description: Navigate to the correct export directory.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The save dialog's current directory path shows '/home/ga/DICOM/exports'.

task_completion.description: Enter the correct filename for the PDF.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The filename field in the save dialog contains exactly 'teaching_handout.pdf'.

task_completion.description: Execute the save or print action.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The agent clicks the 'Save', 'Print', or 'OK' button in the dialog to finalize the PDF creation, and the dialog subsequently closes.

integrity.description: Agent used the DICOM viewer GUI to generate the PDF.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with the DICOM viewer's print/export menus rather than terminal commands like 'touch' or 'convert' to spoof the file.

integrity.description: The PDF generation includes the actual DICOM image.
integrity.visual_evidence: The print preview or export dialog shows the loaded XA demo DICOM image, ensuring a blank or dummy PDF is not being created.

integrity.description: Agent did not spoof the output file.
integrity.visual_evidence: There is no evidence of the agent renaming an existing unrelated file or using a text editor to create a fake PDF document.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected output path for the PDF is exactly '/home/ga/DICOM/exports/teaching_handout.pdf'. The loaded DICOM image is an XA demo from Rubo Medical (0002.DCM).
